payload.text: Create an app where I can upload a script and receive a sequence of generated storyboard images.

**Defining Application Scope**

I've been solidifying the core features. The React application will need a script upload function, a storyboard generation engine, the Gemini model integration for image creation, and an interface for specifying image size. This is beginning to shape a clear, concise outline.


**Refining UI and Integration**

I'm now focusing on the user interface and Gemini API integration details. I'm prioritizing implementing the chatbot and ensuring the application aesthetics meet high standards. I also aim to adhere meticulously to Gemini API guidelines. The plan is to create components for key functionalities, alongside service files for Gemini interaction.

entries.description: HTML entry point with Tailwind CSS and Font configuration
Service for interacting with Gemini API models

diagnostics.message: All declarations of 'aistudio' must have identical modifiers.

Subsequent property declarations must have the same type.  Property 'aistudio' must be of type 'AIStudio', but here has type '{ hasSelectedApiKey: () => Promise<boolean>; openSelectKey: () => Promise<void>; }'.

entries.description: Defined the AIStudio interface and updated the window augmentation to use it, resolving type mismatch and modifier conflict errors with the environment's global declarations.
